name_en: C🏠 Latest size small bucket bag in stock # Stunning looks Monogram series 💢 The bag features the Triumph buckle logo as the main pattern, surrounded by brown cowhide trim, creating a retro element. The retro color scheme is perfect for winter with a coat. Large capacity, light weight, wear-resistant, water-resistant, and scratch-resistant 🔺
